title: Avoiding render in scroll handler
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. requestAnimationFrame throttle.
2. transform via CSS not state.

title: Faster bulk delete via partition drop
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Partition by time; DROP partition.
2. Instant; no WAL flood.

title: Reducing TLS handshake overhead
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. TLS 1.3 0-RTT for resumption.
2. Session tickets default in modern.

title: Avoiding redirect chains
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Direct to final.
2. HSTS preload for https forcing.
solution:
// nginx: single redirect
if ($host = 'www.example.com') { return 301 https://example.com$request_uri; }

title: Avoiding circular references in React tree
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. WeakRef for back-pointers.
2. Or restructure.
solution: // avoid bidirectional strong refs

title: V8 GC tuning
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. --max-old-space-size for high mem.
2. Profile before tuning.
solution: node --max-old-space-size=4096 app.js

title: Avoiding heavy initialization in render
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. useState(() => new Heavy()) calls once.
2. useMemo for ref-stable instance.

title: Avoiding polyfilling features used by 1%

performance_problem.symptom: Polyfill for old Safari that's 1% users

reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Define minimum supported.
2. Block message for older.
solution:
// .browserslistrc
> 1%
last 2 versions
not dead
not ie 11

title: Avoiding pg_stat overhead
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Tune max and track levels.
solution:
-- postgresql.conf
pg_stat_statements.max = 5000
pg_stat_statements.track = 'top'

title: Connection coalescing with HTTP/2
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. HTTP/2 single conn multiplex.
2. Don't shard subdomains.
solution:
// avoid: cdn1.example.com, cdn2.example.com (legacy HTTP/1.1 trick)
// prefer: single cdn.example.com on H2

title: Avoiding render-blocking JS
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. defer for module-order preserved.
2. async for fire-and-forget.
solution:
<script src="/main.js" defer></script>
<script src="/analytics.js" async></script>

title: Avoiding leaks via timers in classes
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Pair setInterval with clearInterval.
2. Functional: useEffect with cleanup.
solution: // see perf-006

title: Heap dumps on demand
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. v8.writeHeapSnapshot on signal.
2. Inspector inside private network.

title: Avoiding setState in for loop
diagnosis_steps: React batches in event but not async
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Compute final state outside React, set once.

title: Avoiding source maps in prod runtime
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Upload to error tracker; don't serve.
2. Or hidden source map (no sourcemap comment).

title: Avoiding cross-database joins
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Materialize cross-DB data via ETL.
2. App-side join for small sets.
solution: // nightly ETL projects A.users into B.

title: Avoiding Set-Cookie on every response
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Set only on change.
2. Server-side session id only.
solution: // session middleware: only Set-Cookie when changed

title: Avoiding console.log in render
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Strip via babel/swc in prod.
solution:
// vite: drop console in prod
build: { minify: 'esbuild', esbuild: { drop: ['console', 'debugger'] } }

title: Reducing JS payload with code splitting + tree shake
reasoning: Same combinations.
solution: // see perf-009

title: Avoiding memory leaks in canvas
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Clear paths between frames.
2. Reuse Path2D instances.

reasoning:

reasoning:

title: Avoiding double-render in dev StrictMode
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. StrictMode reveals bugs.
2. Make effects idempotent.

title: Externalizing libs in webpack
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. externals declares lib provided.
2. import resolves to global.

title: 103 Early Hints

reasoning:

2. Browser preloads while origin works.
solution:

title: Avoiding non-composited animations
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. transform/opacity composited (GPU).
2. left/top trigger layout.

title: Avoiding leaks via JSON.stringify on circular
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Use safe stringify or break cycles.
solution: // see test-231

title: Avoiding inefficient subqueries
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. ANALYZE updates stats.
2. Rewrite via CTE or temp table.
solution:
// ANALYZE table; check stats
-- VACUUM ANALYZE orders;

title: Avoiding effects without deps

performance_problem.symptom: useEffect with no deps array runs each render

reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. [] = once on mount.
2. exhaustive-deps lint.
solution:
useEffect(() => { ... }, []); // once
useEffect(() => { ... }, [a, b]); // when changes

title: User flow performance

performance_problem.symptom: Single-page metrics don't capture user flow

reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Track time-to-conversion etc.
2. RUM with custom marks.
